items.title: Typing indicators
items.description: Show '(User) is typing...' in real-time. WS typing:start/typing:stop events, debounced broadcast, UI display.

items.title: Unread message badges/counters
items.description: Per-channel unread count tracking, mark-as-read on channel view, badge display on channel list and server icons.

items.title: User presence (online/away/offline)
items.description: Heartbeat mechanism via WS, presence state tracking, broadcast status changes to relevant users, status dots in member list and DM sidebar.

items.title: Emoji reactions on messages
items.description: Reaction picker, reactions table (actor+message+emoji), WS broadcast, display under messages, federated via Like activities.

items.title: @ mentions with notifications
items.description: Parse @username in message content, autocomplete dropdown in input, highlight mentions in rendered messages, notification badge for mentions.

items.title: Threaded replies
items.description: Reply to specific messages. inReplyTo field already exists in objects table. Thread view panel, reply count indicator on parent message.

items.title: Message search
items.description: Full-text search across channels. Postgres tsvector index on objects.content, search endpoint, search UI with results panel.

items.title: Markdown formatting and code blocks
items.description: Parse markdown in message content (bold, italic, strikethrough, lists, inline code, code blocks with syntax highlighting).

items.title: File and image uploads
items.description: Upload endpoint with local or S3 storage, image preview in messages, file attachment UI, drag-and-drop support.

items.title: User profiles and avatars
items.description: Avatar upload, bio/status message, profile display panel, avatar display in messages and member list.

items.title: Edit history indicator
items.description: Show (edited) badge on edited messages, optionally show edit history on click.

items.title: Notification settings (mute channels/servers)
items.description: Per-channel and per-server mute preferences, notification filtering.

items.title: Channel categories
items.description: Group channels under collapsible categories within a server.

items.title: Private channels
items.description: Permission-based channel visibility. Only invited members can see/join private channels.

items.title: Per-room glossaries for in-group terminology
items.description: Channel-level glossary stored in properties.glossary, sent to translation pipeline as context.

items.title: DM federation with cross-instance key exchange
